untranslatable_reason: 13-candle series pattern completion cannot be expressed with available indicators. Pattern detection requires custom lookback logic to identify the specific 13-candle sequence. Additionally, last candle close position (upper/middle/lowest third of range) requires relative range positioning logic not available in the indicator set. Performance parameters (3.77%, 5.76%, -4.46%, -7.00%) appear context-dependent on candle position and market regime but lack sufficient detail for conditional mapping.
translation_notes: This pattern requires a custom pattern recognition engine to detect 13-candle series formations. The signal is regime-dependent (BULL_MARKET vs BEAR_MARKET) and confirmation requires black candle in bull markets or lower close in bear markets. Performance varies significantly based on last candle close position: upper third (3.77%/5.76%), middle third (5.87%/4.04%), lowest third (7.75%/0.00%). Recommend implementing pattern detection as a separate module before entry conditions.
